analysis.reasoning: Core message: Pompeo urges transatlantic cooperation against the "China challenge" to protect free societies, prosperity, and the future. Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – implied defense of "our free societies" but not explicitly celebrating U.S. historical tradition; not a fit. US2 (admirable society) – no mention of U.S. social groups or civil society; not applicable. US3 (hostile enemies) – clearly frames China as a challenge/threat to liberal values and prosperity, depicting an adversary; applicable. US4 (force for good) – implies defending freedoms, but the tweet focuses on countering China rather than showcasing U.S. support for human rights directly; borderline but not sufficiently evidenced. US5 (great international ally) – calls for working together transatlantically, suggesting alliance leadership/cooperation, but it doesn’t explicitly praise allies or emphasize U.S. support to a specific ally; weak fit, likely not. US6 (at the forefront) – no claim of U.S. leadership or superiority; not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US3.
